allow: PowerShell($clsid = \(Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Classes\\FastHenry2.Document\\CLSID"\)."\(default\)"; Write-Host "CLSID: $clsid"; $server = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Classes\\CLSID\\$clsid\\LocalServer32" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($server\) { Write-Host "LocalServer32 \(exe\): $\($server.'\(default\)'\)" } else { $inproc = Get-ItemProperty "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Classes\\CLSID\\$clsid\\InprocServer32" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($inproc\) { Write-Host "InprocServer32 \(dll\): $\($inproc.'\(default\)'\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-Process FastHenry2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, WorkingSet64, CPU | Format-Table; if \(-not \(Get-Process FastHenry2 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Host "FastHenry2 not currently running — checking exe size instead"; \(Get-Item "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\FastFieldSolvers\\FastHenry2\\FastHenry2.exe"\).Length / 1MB })
Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('App/SimulationData/lhs_samples.json'\)\); s=d['samples'][0] if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d[0]; print\(list\(s.keys\(\)\)\); print\(s\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; src=open\('App/Tabs/automation_nn_tab.py'\).read\(\); ast.parse\(src\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; src=open\('App/Tabs/automation_nn_tab.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\); ast.parse\(src\); print\('Syntax OK'\)")
